candidate.title: NCCL July GIN and CuTeDSL issue supplement

identity_keys.title: [Question]: How does the CuTeDSL device API legally dereference the host-side `ncclDevComm` on the device?
[Issue]: GIN gdaki mode hardcode 4K MTU in doca modify qp

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Read the two local scheduled crawler issue captures for #2246 and #1957 and checked the June joined NCCL API/comment corpus, the July 1/3 NCCL scheduled supplement manifest, existing NCCL curated pages, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, ingest.md, and prior parent manifests. The June joined API/comment corpus curated scope ends at issues created through 2026-06-22 and closed through 2026-06-23; a zgrep for #2246/#1957 identities in the joined corpus returned no matches. The July 1/3 supplement contains only #2226 and #2024.
local_checks.wiki_search: Before parent-28, curated NCCL GitHub Closed Issues represented the joined API/comment corpus, the July 1/3 page-level supplement for #2226 and #2024, and the closed-issue workflow caveat. NCCL Release Notes already represented GIN terminology from NCCL 2.29.7, 2.30.3, 2.30.4, and 2.30.7. NCCL Arxiv Papers and parent-25 represented abstract discovery only. Curated pages, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, and ingest.md did not contain #2246, #1957, CuTeDSL, ncclDevComm, cudaErrorIllegalAddress, gin_alltoall_pure, 1500 MTU, 4K MTU, or doca modify qp as promoted parent evidence.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: Read ai_infra wiki/index.md and nearby NCCL pages. The existing index routes NCCL operational issue evidence to NCCL GitHub Closed Issues and NCCL project pages, so parent-28 updates those pages and the coverage map instead of creating a new standalone page.

duplicate_boundaries.result: Duplicate boundary for the joined API/comment corpus through June 2026 and the July 1/3 #2226/#2024 supplement; parent-28 adds only #2246 and #1957 as later page-level issue snapshots.
Prior scheduled supplement includes GIN GPI/GDAKI QP-selection question #2226 and H20/H200 broadcast hang report #2024, but not #2246 or #1957.
Duplicate boundary for official release-note GIN terminology only; parent-28 does not turn issue #1957 into release-note or compatibility evidence.
Parent-25 covered NCCL arXiv abstract discovery and did not update GitHub issue coverage.

gap_reason: The local NCCL corpus already had official release-note GIN terminology, a June joined closed-issue API/comment corpus, and a July 1/3 page-level supplement for #2226/#2024, but it did not represent the later issue #2246 CuTeDSL device-API question/report or issue #1957 GIN GDAKI MTU report. Parent-28 can add a bounded page-level issue supplement without duplicating earlier NCCL release-note, arXiv, technical-blog, or issue evidence.

promoted_boundaries.coverage: Issue #2246 as a CuTeDSL NCCL device-API question/report where a host-created `ncclDevComm` pointer passed into an H20 kernel failed on first device-side `dev_comm.lsa_rank` dereference with `cudaErrorIllegalAddress`.
Issue #1957 as a GIN GDAKI mode report where `gin_alltoall_pure` with a 1500 MTU NIC hung and the reporter observed hard-coded 4K MTU behavior in `doca modify qp` / `doca modify QP` context.

unpromoted_boundaries: No maintainer replies, issue comments, root causes, confirmed fixes, release-note guarantees, platform support rules, benchmark baselines, production incidents, or service SLOs are inferred from the page bodies.

No CuTeDSL, ncclDevComm, H20, HMM, ATS, Grace-Hopper coherence, pinned-mapped memory, managed memory, device memory, GIN, GPI, GDAKI, DOCA, QP, or MTU behavior is generalized beyond the page-visible issue reports and existing release-note context.

The parent-28 knowledge supplement itself does not require accelerator structured data, source registry rows, benchmark tables, crawler code, frontend code, dashboard code, package files, or unrelated docs. This run-local task also carries separate harness recovery guardrail changes for the active remediation path.
